import torch, os
os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
combined = {}
for i in range(1, 6):
    ckpt = torch.load(f'checkpoints/run_epoch{i}.pt', map_location='cpu')
    combined[f'm{i}'] = ckpt
    print(f'Loaded epoch {i}')
torch.save(combined, 'checkpoints/epoch_ensemble.pt')
print('Saved checkpoints/epoch_ensemble.pt')
